allow: WebSearch
PowerShell(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content | Measure-Object -Character\).Characters\) chars" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/essentials.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/cities.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "essentials.html: $\($r1.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r1.Content | Measure-Object -Character\).Characters\) chars"; "cities.html: $\($r2.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r2.Content | Measure-Object -Character\).Characters\) chars" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | Select-Object @{N='Size';E={'{0,8:N0}' -f $_.Length}}, @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\", ""\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($pages = @\("index.html","map.html","essentials.html","transport.html","cities.html"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$p : $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "$p : ERROR — $_" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | Select-Object @{N='Size';E={'{0,8:N0} B' -f $_.Length}}, @{N='File';E={$_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\", ""\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($pages = @\("index.html","essentials.html","cities.html","js/cities-data.js","js/cities-render.js","css/style.css"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$p : $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content | Measure-Object -Character\).Characters\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "$p : ERROR — $_" } })

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | Select-Object @{N='Size';E={'{0,8:N0} B' -f $_.Length}}, Name; $files; Write-Host "`n--- Checking for stale references ---"; $content = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\index.html" -Raw; if \($content -match "map\\.html|transport\\.html"\) { Write-Host "WARNING: index.html still references map.html or transport.html" } else { Write-Host "index.html: clean ✓" }; $content2 = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\essentials.html" -Raw; if \($content2 -match "map\\.html|transport\\.html"\) { Write-Host "WARNING: essentials.html still references map.html or transport.html" } else { Write-Host "essentials.html: clean ✓" }; $content3 = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\cities.html" -Raw; if \($content3 -match "map\\.html|transport\\.html"\) { Write-Host "WARNING: cities.html still references map.html or transport.html" } else { Write-Host "cities.html: clean ✓" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N0} B  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\", ""\) })

PowerShell($cities = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\cities.html" -Raw; $checks = @{ 'Tailwind CDN' = 'cdn.tailwindcss.com'; 'Leaflet CSS' = 'leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css'; 'Leaflet JS' = 'leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js'; 'cities-data.js' = 'js/cities-data.js'; 'cities-render.js' = 'js/cities-render.js'; 'script.js' = 'js/script.js' }; foreach \($k in $checks.Keys\) { if \($cities -match [regex]::Escape\($checks[$k]\)\) { Write-Host "[OK] $k" } else { Write-Host "[MISSING] $k" } })

PowerShell($pages = @\("index.html","essentials.html","cities.html","js/cities-data.js","js/cities-render.js","css/style.css"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$p : $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\(\($r.Content | Measure-Object -Character\).Characters\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "$p : ERROR — $_" } }; Write-Host "`n--- File listing ---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N0} B  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\", ""\) })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\index.html" -Raw; $refs = @\(\); if \($content -match "map\\.html"\) { $refs += "map.html" }; if \($content -match "transport\\.html"\) { $refs += "transport.html" }; if \($refs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "index.html: No stale references ✓" } else { Write-Host "index.html: STALE REFS - $refs" }; $content2 = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\essentials.html" -Raw; $refs2 = @\(\); if \($content2 -match "map\\.html"\) { $refs2 += "map.html" }; if \($content2 -match "transport\\.html"\) { $refs2 += "transport.html" }; if \($refs2.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "essentials.html: No stale references ✓" } else { Write-Host "essentials.html: STALE REFS - $refs2" })
PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\data")

PowerShell($pages = @\("index.html","essentials.html","cities.html","data/cities.json","js/cities-search.js","js/cities-render.js","js/script.js","css/style.css"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "OK  $p — $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "ERR $p — $_" } }; Write-Host "`n--- File structure ---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide" | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N0} B  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\", ""\) })

PowerShell($refs = @\(\); $files = @\("index.html","essentials.html","cities.html"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $c = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\$f" -Raw; if \($c -match "map\\.html"\) { $refs += "$f → map.html" }; if \($c -match "transport\\.html"\) { $refs += "$f → transport.html" }; if \($c -match "cities-data\\.js"\) { $refs += "$f → cities-data.js" } }; if \($refs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "No stale references ✓" } else { Write-Host "STALE: $refs" }; Write-Host "`ncities.html scripts:"; $c3 = Get-Content "d:\\code\\china-travel-guide\\cities.html" -Raw; if \($c3 -match 'script src="\([^"]+\)"'\) { $matches | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "OK — Server running. Pages available:"; @\("index.html","essentials.html","cities.html","guestbook.html","guestbook/admin.html"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "  ✓ http://localhost:8080/$_" } catch { Write-Host "  ✗ $_" } } } catch { Write-Host "Server failed to start: $_" })
